title: Development
description: We build websites, web services, calculators, CRM systems, dashboards and custom tools for specific tasks.

items.title: Websites
items.description: Landing pages and multi-page websites with responsive layout and clear structure.

items.title: Web applications
items.description: Interactive interfaces, personal accounts, internal services and product pages.

items.title: Mobile applications
items.description: Development and prototyping of mobile solutions around user scenarios.

items.title: Online stores
items.description: Catalogs, product cards, carts, forms, integrations and purchase logic.

items.title: Calculators
items.description: Cost, income, service or parameter calculations with request submission.

items.title: Quizzes and forms
items.description: Interactive forms for requests, client segmentation and cost estimation.

items.title: CRM systems
items.description: Tools for processing requests, clients, statuses and internal workflows.

items.title: Dashboards
items.description: Data visualization, filters, tables, charts and work panels.

items.title: Parsing systems
items.description: Collecting and structuring data from open sources and services.

items.title: API integrations
items.description: We connect websites, CRM, forms, ad accounts, spreadsheets and external services.

items.title: Process automation
items.description: We remove manual work: requests, notifications, spreadsheets, statuses and reports.

items.title: Admin panels
items.description: Interfaces for managing content, requests, data and users.

items.title: Data storage
items.description: We configure data storage, structure, relations and information workflows.

items.title: Maintenance and support
items.description: Fixes, development of existing projects and technical support.
